---
title: 'Juno: Optimizing High-Dimensional Approximate Nearest Neighbour Search with
  Sparsity-Aware Algorithm and Ray-Tracing Core Mapping'
author:
- Zihan Liu
- Wentao Ni
- Jingwen Leng
- Yu Feng
- Cong Guo
- Quan Chen
- Chao Li
- Minyi Guo
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Work We Contributed to
topics:
- mlsys
url_source: https://dl.acm.org/doi/pdf/10.1145/3620665.3640360
code_source: https://github.com/SubjectNoi/RTANN
journ: ASPLOS
year: 2024
contrib: Work We Contributed to
image: featured.png
pub_number: 77
---
